# cc-orchestrate


Orchestrate fleets of Claude Code agents across pluggable backends like cmux and superset.


``` bash
cc-orchestrate [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```


<span class="gd-details-chevron" aria-hidden="true"></span>Full --help output


    Usage: cc-orchestrate [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

      Orchestrate fleets of Claude Code agents across pluggable backends like cmux
      and superset.

    Options:
      --version  Show the version and exit.
      --help     Show this message and exit.

    Commands:
      backends  List supported backends and whether each is installed on this...


# Options


`--version`  
Show the version and exit.


# Commands


`backends`  
[List supported backends and whether each is installed on this machine.](../../reference/cli/backends.md)
